translations.The Pexip integration app implements a S:
Pexip integratsiya ilovasi Pexip uchrashuvlarini yaratish va darhol uchrashuv havolasini olish uchun Smart Picker provayderini joriy qiladi.

Qo'shimcha ma'lumot [loyihaning README] (https://github.com/julien-nc/integration_pexip/#readme) da.
translations.On the Pexip side, the \"policy server U: Pexip tomonida, "policy server URI" {policyUri} ga o'rnatilgan bo'lishi kerak.
translations.Failed to save Pexip admin options: Pexip administrator sozlamalarini saqlashda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Host & guest pin set: Xost va mehmon uchun pin to'plami
translations.Host pin set & No guest pin: Xost PIN-kodi o'rnatildi va mehmon PIN-kodi yo'q
translations.Error deleting the Pexip call: Pexip qo'ng'irog'ini o'chirishda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Between 4 and 20 digits optionally follo: 4 tadan 20 tagacha raqamdan keyin ixtiyoriy ravishda bir yoki bir nechta raqam qo'shiladi
translations.Host pin (mandatory if you allow guests): Xost pin (agar mehmonlarga ruxsat bersangiz, majburiy)
translations.Error getting the Pexip calls: Pexip qo'ng'iroqlarini olishda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Error creating the Pexip call: Pexip chaqiruvini yaratishda xatolik yuz berdi
translations.Name: Nomi
